title: The Whole Damn Circus
lore: He looked out at the whole degenerate crowd and understood, all at once, that every last one had a weekend as ruined as his. Then he put the shades back on and ordered another.
omen: Everyone here is the main character.
factoid: 'Sonder,' coined by John Koenig, names the realization that every passing stranger lives a life as vivid as your own.
